scripts.web:dev: concurrently -k -n server,client -c auto "npm --workspace server run dev" "npm --workspace client run dev"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.docker:push: docker buildx build --provenance=true --sbom=true --platform linux/amd64 -t react-express-monorepo-skeleton:latest -f server/Dockerfile --push .
scripts.docker:run: npm run docker:rm && npm run docker:build && docker run --name react-express-monorepo-skeleton --rm -p 8080:8080 --env-file server/docker.env react-express-monorepo-skeleton:dev
